title: Brooklyn Bridge at Twilight
caption: Blue hour over the East River, with the city settling in for the night.
alt: Brooklyn Bridge at twilight with the lit Manhattan skyline reflecting on the East River and rocks in the foreground

title: Mosaic Rooftop
caption: Chevron tile on an old cathedral — patterns made for the sky.
alt: Close-up of the patterned chevron tile roof of a European cathedral with two small dormer windows

title: Underpass
caption: A pedestrian tunnel engineered for some quieter future.
alt: A symmetric futuristic pedestrian tunnel with white curved panels and blue accents leading to a vanishing point

title: Glade Creek Grist Mill
caption: Falling water and falling leaves, all in the same frame.
alt: An autumn waterfall in front of Glade Creek Grist Mill surrounded by yellow and orange foliage

title: Blue Ridge at Dusk
caption: Layers of ridges fading into a pink dusk.
alt: Layered Blue Ridge mountains receding into haze beneath a pink sunset sky

title: Portland Head Light
caption: Long exposure on the surf below the headland.
alt: Portland Head Lighthouse silhouetted against a pastel sunset with waves blurring across foreground rocks

title: Catawba Falls
caption: A cascade hidden in lush green.
alt: Catawba Falls cascading over rocks in a lush green forest

title: Barred Owl
caption: Eye contact — the gaze that gives nothing away.
alt: A barred owl staring directly at the camera against a dark wooden background

title: Manhattan at Sunset
caption: Old pier pilings in front of Lower Manhattan at golden hour.
alt: Manhattan skyline at sunset above a row of weathered pier pilings reflecting in calm water

title: Peacock in the Garden
caption: An afternoon visitor, keeping to the boxwood.
alt: A peacock peeking above garden boxwood with a grape trellis behind

title: Portland Head, Different Evening
caption: The same headland — warmer light, wildflowers in bloom.
alt: Portland Head Lighthouse at sunset with warm light over the rocky coast and wildflowers in bloom

title: Burano
caption: Painted houses, reflected in the canal.
alt: Colorful painted houses lining a canal in Burano with two boats moored and reflections on still water

title: Venetian Arch
caption: A wooden chair, an open arch, an old city.
alt: A wooden chair beneath a stone arch overlooking a quiet Venetian canal

title: Cardinal on String Lights
caption: A female cardinal pauses between the porch lights, framed by bokeh.
alt: A female cardinal perched on a string of patio lights with green and blue bokeh in the background

title: Portland, Oregon
caption: The old stag sign caught between passing headlights.
alt: The Portland Oregon white stag neon sign at night with red and white light trails from passing cars

title: Rose Garden
caption: Wandering the test garden, late afternoon.
alt: A figure walking down a rose garden path with an orange rose in the foreground

title: Young Bald Eagle
caption: A juvenile bald eagle keeps watch from a fallen pine.
alt: A juvenile bald eagle perched on a horizontal pine branch in a dark green forest

title: Dragonfly on Roses
caption: A moment of stillness before lift-off.
alt: A dragonfly resting on a red and white hybrid rose with another rose below
